assumptions: Source tables vbak and vbap exist in Snowflake with compatible column data types
Key columns vbeln and posnr maintain their original data types for join compatibility
conversion_notes: Stripped ABAP annotations @AbapCatalog.sqlViewName and @EndUserText.label as they are metadata-only
Converted CDS view 'define view' syntax to Snowflake 'CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW'
Preserved INNER JOIN logic and ON condition
Maintained CASE statement logic with numeric comparison
Key column indicators removed as they are CDS-specific metadata
